name: Orderchamp Dropshipping
description: Orderchamp GraphQL API for dropshipping catalog/import-list flows, order creation, fulfillment updates, and webhooks.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Orderchamp private app or OAuth access token.

tools.name: graphql
tools.description: Call Orderchamp's GraphQL API. Use queries such as account, products, product, publications, publication, orders, order, shipments, webhooks; use mutations such as ingestedOrderCreate, integrationOrderCreate, integrationOrderCancel, inventoryLevelAdjust, and webhook create/update mutations according to the Orderchamp schema.

operationName.description: Operation name when the document contains multiple operations.
